title: The Enchanted Woods
setting: A mystical forest with towering trees and glowing flowers.

scenes.text: One sunny afternoon, Timmy wandered into the woods. He had heard stories of magical creatures but never believed them... until now. A soft glow caught his eye, leading him deeper into the forest than he'd ever gone before.
scenes.image_description: Timmy following a glowing light path through dense trees

scenes.text: Suddenly, Timmy stumbled upon a tiny creature with glittering wings and luminescent skin. It was Glowie, the guardian of the Enchanted Woods! Glowie smiled at Timmy, inviting him to explore their hidden world together.
scenes.image_description: Timmy meeting Glowie under a canopy of sparkling plants

scenes.text: Together they flew over whispering streams, played tag with friendly fairies, and even had a picnic with giant mushrooms. Timmy's heart was filled with wonder and new friendship as he waved goodbye to Glowie, promising to keep their secret safe.
scenes.image_description: Timmy and Glowie laughing during a magical picnic
